message:
feat(tui): wire ActionKind::Execute to real dispatcher with deferred modal support (br-1xt0m.1.6.1)

Route action menu Execute operations through dispatch_execute_operation()
with pattern matching for navigation, filter, server-dispatched, and copy
operations. Add DEFERRED_CONFIRMED_ACTION static for modal callback bridge,
drain on tick, extract_numeric_id helper, and ActionExecute screen message
variant. 9 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
